# ZIP(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  zip — package and compress files into ZIP archive

## SYNOPSIS
  zip <archive.zip> <files...>

## DESCRIPTION
Creates a ZIP-format compressed archive.

## EXAMPLES
  zip evidence.zip /var/log/nexus.log /home/ghost/.notes
  unzip evidence.zip

## SEE ALSO
  unzip, gzip, tar
